skill.name: copy-editing
skill.description: Guides systematic editing of marketing copy through focused sweeps for clarity, tone, benefits, proof, specificity, emotion, and conversion risk.
skill.summary: Review and improve existing marketing copy with a structured seven-sweep editing process.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported weak cryptographic algorithm patterns, but the matches are false positives in Markdown prose. No evidence found of executable code, data exfiltration, network access, external commands, filesystem abuse, or prompt injection attempts.

low_findings.title: False Positive Weak Cryptography Matches in Prose
low_findings.description: The static findings, including two matches on line 3, match ordinary copy-editing words instead of cryptographic code. The skill contains guidance text only, with no crypto APIs, scripts, network calls, or executable logic.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged locations are plain Markdown instructions about copy editing. I found no cryptographic functions, code execution, external commands, network requests, or prompt injection text.

content.user_title: Improve Marketing Copy with Seven Editing Sweeps
content.value_statement: Marketing copy often loses impact through unclear claims, weak proof, or inconsistent tone. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through focused editing passes that preserve the message while improving clarity and persuasion.
actual_capabilities: Reviews existing marketing copy through seven focused editing sweeps.
Checks clarity, voice, benefits, proof, specificity, emotion, and conversion risk.
Provides quick word-level, sentence-level, and paragraph-level editing checks.
Flags unsupported claims, vague phrasing, buried calls to action, and mixed audiences.
Suggests specific edits while preserving the author's core message.
limitations: It does not write complete campaigns from scratch.
It depends on the user to provide audience, goal, and brand voice context.
It cannot verify customer statistics or testimonials without supplied evidence.
It does not replace legal review for regulated claims.

use_cases.title: Landing Page Copy Review
use_cases.description: Review a landing page for unclear benefits, weak proof, friction near the call to action, and inconsistent voice.

use_cases.title: Email Campaign Polish
use_cases.description: Improve an email sequence by tightening sentences, clarifying the offer, and strengthening emotional relevance.

use_cases.title: Product Messaging Cleanup
use_cases.description: Turn vague product claims into specific, audience-focused messaging with clearer proof and stronger outcomes.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Copy Sweep
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this marketing copy for clarity, tone, and grammar. Keep the core message intact and suggest concise edits.

prompt_templates.title: Seven Sweep Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Run the seven copy-editing sweeps on this copy. Report findings by sweep and include specific revision suggestions.

prompt_templates.title: Conversion Friction Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this page copy for benefits, proof, specificity, emotional pull, and risk near the call to action. Prioritize high-impact edits.

prompt_templates.title: Brand Voice Preservation
prompt_templates.prompt: Edit this copy while preserving the stated brand voice. Explain each important edit and note any missing proof or audience context.

output_examples.input: Our innovative platform helps teams optimize workflows and improve productivity.
output_examples.output: Suggested edit: Our platform helps marketing teams cut weekly reporting time by turning campaign data into clear next steps. Reason: The revision names the audience, outcome, and practical value.

output_examples.input: Trusted by many companies to deliver great results.
output_examples.output: Finding: The claim needs proof. Suggested edit: Add a named customer quote, a specific result, or a source-backed customer count.

output_examples.input: Contact us to learn more about our solution.
output_examples.output: Suggested edit: Book a 20-minute demo to see how the workflow fits your team. Reason: The action is clearer and sets expectations.

best_practices: Provide the target audience, copy goal, and desired reader action before review.
Ask for one focused sweep when time is limited or feedback needs to be narrow.
Supply proof, customer data, and brand voice rules so edits stay accurate.
anti_patterns: Do not ask it to invent proof, testimonials, or statistics.
Do not use every suggested edit without checking brand and legal requirements.
Do not combine new copywriting, strategy, and editing requests without clear priorities.

faq.question: What kind of copy does this skill review?
faq.answer: It reviews existing marketing copy, including landing pages, emails, ads, product pages, and conversion-focused website sections.

faq.question: Can it write new copy from scratch?
faq.answer: It is designed for editing existing copy. It can suggest rewrites, but full copywriting needs more strategy context.

faq.question: How does the seven-sweep method work?
faq.answer: It reviews one dimension at a time, then checks that later edits did not weaken earlier improvements.

faq.question: Will it preserve brand voice?
faq.answer: Yes, when you provide brand voice guidance. Without that context, it can only infer tone from the supplied copy.

faq.question: Can it verify marketing claims?
faq.answer: It can flag unsupported claims. It cannot verify facts unless you provide sources or evidence.

faq.question: Is this useful for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill provides a reusable editing workflow for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code sessions.
